type.help: none: no significance displayed, bar: error bars are used, box: boxes on the reference curve are displayed

rescale.help: the plot is scaled using the values of the curves. If set to True, the values of the significance are also used to scale the Y axis, ensuring that the significance boxes or bars are visible

bar_linewidth.help: line width for bars, if null the width of the curve line width is used

color.help: color of the bar or box. If not set, the color of the curve color is used
